x-enumeration-literals.name: Automatic Posting Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies that credit plan transactions are automatically posted by the banking system without manual intervention once calculation or triggering conditions are met.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Manual Posting Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies that a bank employee must manually initiate or approve the posting of credit plan transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Posting Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies that transactions are posted at predefined intervals according to a schedule.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event-Based Posting Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines posting that occurs when a specific event related to the credit plan takes place.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Batch Posting Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies that multiple credit plan transactions are collected and posted together in batch processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Real-Time Posting Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies that transactions are posted immediately when the transaction occurs.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Deferred Posting Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies that posting occurs at a later time after the transaction is recorded or calculated.
